name: Golf Performance Academy
about: The Golf Performance Academy (GPA) is a specialized training facility located at 4200 Lover Lane, Kalamazoo, MI, focused on instruction and club fitting. They leverage state-of-the-art technology, including Foresight GC2/HMT and Flightscope Launch Monitors, to provide comprehensive analysis for golfers of all skill levels. The academy is adjacent to Milham Park Golf Club's practice area, offering a large putting green and top-tier short game facilities. Their philosophy emphasizes personalized coaching, avoiding one-size-fits-all methods to help each student understand and improve their unique swing. GPA also offers custom club fitting services, claiming to be the most comprehensive in the area, and features a simulator bay using Foresight Sports technology for realistic golf simulation and club gapping analysis.
why_golfers_like_it: Comprehensive club fitting process using premium launch monitors (Foresight GC2/HMT, Flightscope)
Dual video camera swing analysis with Swing View Pro software for detailed diagnostics
Customized instruction approach tailored to each golfer's unique swing mechanics
Indoor simulation with real golf balls, not range balls, for accurate fitting and practice
Access to a virtual driving range and championship course simulation

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service available.
No mention of alcohol service or BYOB policy.

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch monitor used for fitting and simulation, featuring HMT technology for club head tracking through impact

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but they also offer club rentals, trade-ins for used clubs, and a pro shop with starter and intermediate clubs for purchase.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of on-site food and beverage services or a policy regarding bringing outside food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The text does not specify the time required to complete 18 holes on the simulator.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the academy explicitly states they take pride in improving the games of junior golfers and offer junior golf programs.
